llm_response: Dear Office, I write to check if picnic spots are available this summer. We need a space for our family gathering on July twenty-first. About ten friends and I will attend this special outdoor event. Please confirm the dates and times for our group reservation request. We require a large table and some basic grilling equipment. It is vital that we secure this spot before it fills up. Many families are eager to use the park during these warm days. We hope you can help us find a suitable open area. Your quick reply would be greatly appreciated by our entire group. Let us know if any special rules apply to our visit. We want to ensure everyone has a safe and fun time. Thank you for managing these important park facilities and services. Looking forward to your response.
